title: Speedy Panther 2 Pack Dog Rope Toys for Large Medium Dogs, Durable Chew Toys for Aggressive Chewers, Safe & Non-Toxic Tough Rope Tug Toy for Teeth Cleaning
features: ✅【Ultra-Durable & Safe】 Made from 100% braided natural cotton, this dog rope toy resists tearing and shredding, perfect for aggressive chewers. Non-toxic materials ensure your dog’s safety during playtime
✅【Interactive Tug-of-War Design】 Thick braided ropes with tassels provide a strong grip for interactive play. Strengthen bonding with your dog while promoting dental health by reducing plaque buildup
✅【Ideal for Large Breeds】 Reinforced stitching and 77/52cm length suit powerful jaws of large dogs (e.g., German Shepherds, Labradors). Supports weight up to 50kg, ensuring long-lasting fun
✅【Vibrant & Washable】 Multi-coloured design attracts dogs’ attention. Machine-washable for easy cleaning, maintaining hygiene even after outdoor adventures
✅【2-Pack Value Set】 Double the fun! Includes two rope toys in different colour combinations, perfect for rotation to extend durability and keep your dog engaged
description: Product description Premium Quality & Functionality Crafted for the toughest chewers, our braided cotton rope toys combine durability with safety. The tight 6-strand weaving technique prevents fraying, while soft tassels stimulate your dog’s natural urge to tug and chew. Ideal for indoor fetch or outdoor adventures, these toys help redirect destructive chewing habits. Specifications Material: 100% Natural Cotton (No synthetic dyes or chemicals) Size: 77cm (Length) /52 cm (Length) | Weight: 320g / 220g Colours: Assorted bright combinations (Red/Blue, Green/Yellow, etc.) Why Choose Us? Vet-Recommended: Designed with input from canine behaviorists to promote mental stimulation. Easy Maintenance: Machine-washable at 30°C. Air dry to preserve shape. Satisfaction Guarantee: 12-month durability warranty. Contact us for replacements if damaged within 3 months. Perfect For: Large breeds (e.g., Golden Retrievers, Huskies) needing heavy-duty toys. Multi-dog households seeking interactive play options. Training rewards or anxiety relief through chewing Directions For Dogs
